description_long: This is a modern, foldable electric scooter with a sleek, angular frame finished in a metallic gold color. It features two black wheels, with the front wheel attached to a robust fork and the rear wheel integrated into a streamlined rear arm. The scooter has a distinctive, elongated seat or rear fender, and a straight, minimalistic handlebar. Visible branding and a lightning bolt graphic are present on the side, adding a sporty touch. The overall design is compact and lightweight, suitable for urban commuting and easy storage.
description: A gold, foldable electric scooter with two black wheels, a straight handlebar, and sporty branding details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile, front wheel, and straight handlebar.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full frame, both wheels, branding, and lightning bolt graphic.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rear wheel, elongated seat/fender, and the scooter's slim structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the frame, wheels, and absence of additional graphics.
attribute_deck_design: narrow, elongated, smooth surface with no visible grip pattern
attribute_brand_logo: Text 'ZIP-DRIVE' and a lightning bolt graphic on the side of the frame
